prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次约 7057→7726→8138→8615→9032，呈持续后移趋势，近 5 年累计后移约 1975 名，年均约 395 名；2025 年基准约 9032 名；本省理科（物理类）计划 2021 年 14 人、2022 年 9 人、2023 年 9 人、2024 年 9 人、2025 年 14 人；2026 年计划 32 人，较 2025 年大幅扩招约 128.6%，扩招幅度显著，理论上将明显推高位次数字（竞争缓解）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 43 名逐步下滑至 2026 年第 60 名，近年排名有所下降，但仍属全国百强；2026 年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及学术不端（院长论文造假等）及学校管理事件，可能对考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第 48 位（较热），短视频曝光一般；近年未见明显投档断档记录；社会学 A、世界史 A-，A- 及以上学科仅 2 个，与招生专业大类（电气类、经济学类、理科试验班类）的直接关联较弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气类（集成电路与高端装备方向）对应电子信息/通信大类，2024–2025 年社会热度「高热推荐」；经济学类对应金融/财经/经济大类，热度「分化观望」；理科试验班类对应数理基础，热度「推荐」。本省 2026 年物理类考生约 206500 人，较 2025 年 172468 人增加约 19.7%，竞争加剧；上海大学位于上海市，对陕西考生属跨省报考，地域偏好因素存在但非决定性；该校在陕西招生占比数据缺 失。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划大幅扩招（+128.6%）、本省物理类考生明显增加（+19.7%）以及学校负面声誉等因素，扩招效应占主导但考生增加与负面声誉部分抵消扩招影响。，考虑考生规模扩大与声誉负面因素小幅上调，预测 2026 年最低位次约 16100 名，区间 15600–16600 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（数学与应用数学、应用物理学、理论与应用力学）
- 电气类（集成电路与高端装备方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电气类（理学工学Ⅰ类，含计算机、自动化等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济学类（经济管理类）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 15600–16600 名内，建议以二档电气类为主力、一档理科试验班类冲刺、三档经济学类保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<15600）可重点冲刺一档专业；位次接近区间上限（>16600）应以三档为 主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 7057→7726→8138→8615→9032, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1975 places over the past 5 years, averaging about 395 places per year; the 2025 baseline is about 9032 places; the provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 14 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 14 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 32, a significant expansion of about 128.6% compared to 2025, which theoretically will significantly push the ranking number higher (easing competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking gradually declined from 43rd in 2021 to 60th in 2026, with a recent decline but still among the top 100 nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct (dean's paper fraud, etc.) and school management incidents, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 48th (relatively hot), with general short video exposure; no obvious admission cutoff gaps in recent years; Sociology A, World History A-, only 2 disciplines at A- or above, with weak direct correlation to the enrollment major categories (Electrical, Economics, Science Experimental Class).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical (Integrated Circuit and High-End Equipment direction) corresponds to the Electronics/Information/Communication category, with 2024–2025 social popularity 'highly recommended'; Economics corresponds to the Finance/Economics/Economy category, with popularity 'divergent and wait-and-see'; Science Experimental Class corresponds to mathematical and physical foundations, with popularity 'recommended'. The province's 2026 physics category candidates are about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition; Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, which is a cross-province application for Shaanxi candidates, with regional preference factors existing but not decisive; data on the proportion of its enrollment in Shaanxi is missing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+128.6%), the notable increase in provincial physics category candidates (+19.7%), and the negative reputation of the school, the expansion effect dominates but the increase in candidates and negative reputation partially offset the expansion effect. Taking into account the expansion of the candidate pool and negative reputation factors, a slight upward adjustment is made, predicting the 2026 minimum ranking to be about 16,100, with a range of 15,600–16,600.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Physics, Theoretical and Applied Mechanics)
- Electrical (Integrated Circuit and High-End Equipment Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electrical (Science and Engineering Category I, including Computer Science, Automation, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (Economics and Management Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 15,600–16,600, it is recommended to take Tier 2 Electrical as the main choice, Tier 1 Science Experimental Class as a stretch, and Tier 3 Economics as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<15,600), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>16,600), mainly choose Tier 3.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名第 60 名（2026 年），属全国百强；2026 年声誉评价为「明显负面」，涉及学术不端事件，可能对文科考生报考心理同样产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第 48 位（较热），关注度一般；社会学 A、世界史 A-，与文科招生专业（文科试验班类/社会学类）高度关联，社会学 A 级学科对文科考生有较强吸引力。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 1442–2076 名内，文科仅一个招生大类（文科试验班类），建议位次优于区间下限（<1442）可大胆报考，位次在区间中部可稳报，位次接近区间上限（>2076）需谨慎。入学后第一年末专业 分流，建议优先选择汉语言文学、哲学等基础方向，谨慎选择新闻传播类。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 925→888→861→1122→1441. After a slight forward shift from 2021 to 2023, it significantly moved backward in 2024–2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 580 places in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1441. The provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 3 students in 2021, 3 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 3 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 4 students, an increase of about 33.3% compared to 2025, a moderate expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked 60th in the Soft Science main ranking (2026), among the top 100 nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', involving academic misconduct incidents, which may also suppress the willingness of liberal arts candidates to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 48th (relatively hot), with average attention. Sociology is rated A, World History A-, highly related to liberal arts enrollment majors (liberal arts experimental class/sociology class). The A-level sociology discipline has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
The liberal arts experimental class (including Chinese language and literature, journalism, etc.) corresponds to the Chinese language/Chinese major category (popularity 'recommended') and the journalism and communication major category (popularity 'clearly discouraged'), with clear internal differentiation among majors. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in this province is about 88,500, an increase of about 17.0% compared to 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong appeal for cross-province applications from Shaanxi liberal arts candidates, and Shanghai's regional advantages have a bonus effect for liberal arts candidates.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the clear backward trend in historical rankings over the past two years, the slight expansion in the 2026 plan (+33.3%), the increase in provincial history category candidates (+17.0%), the appeal of the A-level sociology discipline, and the negative reputation of the university, the expansion effect and the increase in candidates roughly offset each other, with the negative reputation slightly prevailing. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 1759, with a range of 1442–2076.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1442–2076, and there is only one liberal arts enrollment major category (Liberal Arts Experimental Class), it is recommended that candidates with rankings better than the lower limit (<1442) can apply boldly, those with rankings in the middle can apply steadily, and those with rankings close to the upper limit (>2076) should be cautious. After enrollment, major diversion occurs at the end of the first year. It is recommended to prioritize basic directions such as Chinese Language and Literature and Philosophy, and be cautious with Journalism and Communication categories.
